result.stdout:
NuOptimizer helps in reducing the problem of exponential complexity in the NuGet's restore algorithm.
It analyses the transitive dependency graph of each project in the codebase and injects extra 
<ProjectReference> and <PackageReference> items so the dependency graph becomes flat.
If the dependency graph changes, the NuOptimizer needs to be run again to re-generate these extra items.

Note, that NuOptimizer can flatten dependency graphs safely only when the CPVM (Central Package Version Management) is enabled.
